label: Stat part (corpse casket)
description: Adds an offset when a corpse is inside an occupied casket of a listed ThingDef type.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

offsetOccupied.label: Offset (occupied)
offsetOccupied.description: Integer offset added to the stat when the corpse is inside a matching casket.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: ThingDefs that qualify as matching caskets for this part.
